title: Winter Melodies
description: Replace the original music from music albums with songs that give  the feeling of being in the winter season.
body:
Replace the original music from music albums with songs that give the feeling of being in the winter season.

 This texture pack is ideal for setting the mood for you game.

In addition to the music, it also changes the textures of records to cassettes and displays the names of the new songs (currently only available in English (US) and Spanish (Mexico).

The list is:

- 11 - Snowy Holiday | Club Penguin
- 13 - Jingle Bells | Club Penguin
- cat - Winter Theme | Stardew Valley
- chirp - Nocturne of Ice | Stardew Valley
- creator_music_box - Wizard Waltz | Club Penguin
- far - Winter Festival | Stardew Valley
- mall - Anchovy Jazz | Club Penguin
- mellohi - Maybe Baby | ClubPenguin
- otherside - Warm Coats | Club Penguin
- pigstep - Ski Lodge | Club Penguin
- precipice - Minecraft Festive Edition Music Battle Map #2
- relic - Minecraft Festive Edition Music Battle Map #1
- stal - Pizza Parlor | Club Penguin
- strad - Carol of the Bubbles | Club Penguin
- tears - Minecraft Festive Edition Music Battle Map #3
- wait - Charlie's Here | Club Penguin
- ward - Noir Noises | Club Penguin
